prerender.description: Grianghraif a rinne an freastalaí le bot amháin. Monatóireacht a dhéanamh ar chlúdach, staleness a bhrath, agus athnuachan bhfeidhm.

guide.title: Plain-English guide
guide.intro: The prerender engine makes saved HTML copies of public pages for search engines and social previews. Members use the normal app; these snapshots are only for crawlers.

bot_only.title: What gets rendered
bot_only.body: Public tenant pages, such as about pages, listings, blog posts, and public groups. Private member areas are not supposed to be rendered.

tenant_scope.title: Tenant safety
tenant_scope.body: When a page belongs to one tenant, actions should include that tenant slug. The engine now checks host and tenant path before touching snapshots.

dry_run.title: Preview first
dry_run.body: A dry run shows what would happen without deleting files or queuing work. Use it before purge or repair actions.

repair.title: Repair stuck queue
repair.body: This is not a content reset. It only releases jobs that look abandoned and lets the worker resume after repeated failures.

workflows.title: What are you trying to do?
workflows.description: Start with the plain task, then use the tab it opens. This keeps routine work away from the risky controls.

refresh_one_tenant.title: Refresh one tenant
refresh_one_tenant.body: Use when public content changed for a single community. Enter its tenant slug before queuing work.

find_stale_pages.title: Find stale or missing pages
find_stale_pages.body: Check coverage first to see which tenants have old snapshots, missing pages, or broken assets.

inspect_cache.title: Inspect saved pages
inspect_cache.body: Search the cache, inspect SEO tags, and recache selected snapshots using tenant-safe routes.

investigate_failures.title: Investigate failed renders
investigate_failures.body: Review routes in the backoff window before retrying, purging, or repairing the queue.

check_tenant_safety.title: Check one tenant is safe
check_tenant_safety.body: Inspect exactly what this tenant should have, what is saved, and whether any snapshots belong elsewhere.

analytics.empty: Níl aon anailísíocht ar fáil. Seans go bhfuil loga rochtana bot folamh.

errors.load: Theip ar an anailísíocht a lódáil

hints.spoofed: mórbot éileamh, theip ar raon IP

sections.recent_activity: Gníomhaíocht le déanaí (an chéad cheann is déanaí, an ceann deireanach {{count}})
sections.top_uris: URIs is fearr (50 barr de réir an chomhairimh)

errors.bulk_enqueue: Theip ar an mórscuaine (b’fhéidir gur scuaine roinnt tionóntaí)

summary.needs_work: {{needing}} ó thionóntaí {{total}} tá bealaí in easnamh, sean, nó sócmhainní briste.

auto_recache.description: Scanann gach pictiúr. Déanann sé scuainí ar thosaíocht íseal do bhealaí a bhfuil a n-ábhar foinse athraithe nó a bhfuil TTL imithe in éag. Ritheann sé ar cron gach 15-30 nóiméad; bain úsáid as seo chun ceann a spreagadh láithreach.
auto_recache.title: Athchúrsáil uathoibríoch (sruth ábhair TTL +)

drift.description: Siúlfaidh sé léarscáil an láithreáin do gach tionónta, déanann sé comparáid idir lastmod agus uaireanta snapshot, agus glacann sé seanleathanaigh ó scríbhinní amh, aistrithe, nó jabanna ciúáilte. Ritheann sé gach 2 nóiméad agus inqueues sleachta ardtosaíochta.
drift.title: Braith sruth (mapa suímh vs pictiúir)

errors.drift_detection: Theip ar bhrath srutha a spreagadh
errors.purge_unexpected: Theip ar an glantachán gan choinne

purge_ungated.description: Grianghraif scuabtha nach bhfuil a mbealach laistigh de shraith ionchais tionónta. Go coitianta tar éis gné a scoránú, nó chun bealaí statacha a ghlanadh a dhéantar gan bratacha gné. Fágtar bealaí ábhar dinimiciúil leo féin.
purge_ungated.title: Glan na pictiúir neamháitithe (glanta 404 in aghaidh an tionónta)

modal.body_suffix: as a chéile a bhfuil a oibrí ina thost le haghaidh >30 min, agus glan an scoradán ciorcaid.
modal.title: Éigeandáil: athshocrú scuaine bhfostú
modal.warning: Ná húsáid é seo ach amháin má dheimhnigh tú go bhfuil an scuaine i bhfostú. Má tá oibrí sláintiúil fós ag rith, cruthóidh sé seo obair dhúblach.

inventory.empty: Ní mheaitseálann aon ghrianghraif na scagairí

inspect.integrity_mismatch: bearta athraithe ó rindreáil - táthar ag súil sha256 {{expected}}..., fuair {{actual}}...
inspect.integrity_missing: níl aon taobhcharr sha256 - tá pictiúr roimh fhíorú sláine nó rinneadh eagarthóireacht láimhe air
inspect.integrity_ok: meaitseálann bearta an sha256 scríofa ag am rindreála
inspect.integrity_unreadable: tá taobhcharr sha256 ann ach tá sé míchumtha
inspect.title: Teideal

failures.description_prefix: Cosáin taisce ar theip orthu le linn rith réamhréiteora le déanaí.

prerender.title: Inneall Réamhshocraithe

tenant_safety.title: Tenant safety inspector
tenant_safety.description: Check one community before refreshing or deleting anything. This view compares the tenant route plan with the saved cache and explains why each snapshot exists.

errors.load: Failed to load tenant safety report.

tenant_safety.empty: Enter a tenant slug to inspect its route plan and saved snapshots.
tenant_safety.empty_attention: This tenant has no missing, stale, asset-broken, or unexpected snapshots.

reasons.sitemap: Published by this tenant sitemap as public content.
reasons.unexpected: Saved for this tenant, but not present in the current static route set or sitemap plan.
reasons.feature_disabled: Would require the {{value}} tenant feature, which is currently off.
reasons.module_disabled: Would require the {{value}} tenant module, which is currently off.

help.title: How to read this
help.expected: Expected routes are pages the engine believes this tenant should expose publicly.
help.unexpected: Unexpected snapshots are saved files that no longer match the tenant plan. They are the highest-risk items to clean up.
help.next_step: Use preview-only cleanup first. Only delete after the preview shows the tenant and routes you expect.

cleanup.title: Cleanup available
cleanup.body: Unexpected snapshots can usually be removed with the cleanup tool in Overview. Preview first, then apply only when the tenant list is correct.

cutover_steps.monitor_and_keep_prerender_fallback: Monitor responses and keep prerender available as fallback until parity is proven.

validation_issues.vite_private_prefix_missing_required: Required Vite private route prefix is missing.

validation_issues.content_sources_not_laravel_api: Content sources must use Laravel public APIs.
validation_issues.content_sources_allow_next_database_quer: Next.js content sources must not query the database.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_invalid: An API-backed route entry is malformed.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_missing_fields: An API-backed route is missing required fields.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_duplicate_key: An API-backed route key is duplicated.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_not_in_manifest: An API-backed route is missing from the public route manifest.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_not_get: API-backed public routes must use GET.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_not_laravel_v2_endpoint: API-backed routes must use relative Laravel v2 endpoints.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_private_endpoint: API-backed public routes must not use private Laravel v2 namespaces.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_endpoint_not_plain_path: API-backed route endpoints must be plain paths without query strings or fragments.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_endpoint_has_path_trave: API-backed route endpoints must not contain path traversal segments.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_param_mismatch: API endpoint parameters must match the public route pattern.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_not_registered: API-backed route endpoint is not registered in Laravel.

cutover_gate_blockers.edge_routes_not_configured: Production edge routes are not configured

playbook.no_activation_control: No activation controls are available on this page.

metrics.bad_outcomes: Theip ar {{count}}, preabadh nó cuireadh faoi chois é

status_breakdown.title: Miondealú Stádais

trigger_issues.title: Ceisteanna Iniúchta Truicear
trigger_issues.subtitle: Sraitheanna foinse inar cheart go mbeadh r-phost nó fógra caite, ach nach bhfuil fianaise iontaofa seachadta ag an iniúchadh.
trigger_issues.empty: Níl aon cheisteanna iniúchta truicear don fhuinneog roghnaithe.

queues.title: Diagnóisic scuaine
queues.subtitle: Theip ar, curtha faoi chois nó imithe i léig ar feitheamh sraitheanna ríomhphoist don tionónta seo.
queues.empty: Níl aon sraitheanna scuaine ríomhphoist theipthe, curtha faoi chois nó sean.

logs.title: Loga Iarrachta Ríomhphoist

suppressions.title: Liosta faoi Shochtadh

suppressions.empty: Ní mheaitseálann aon fhaighteoir faoi chois na scagairí reatha.
suppressions.confirm_remove: Bain {{email}} den liosta faoi shochtadh? Beidh siad i dteideal ríomhphost a fháil arís.

warnings.default_body: Ní mór aird a thabhairt ar sheachadadh ríomhphoist.
